reason: Tests assert on gold-specific implementation details (exact variable name 'current_zookeeper', exact comment strings 'Renew the session on retry', 're-fetch the object list', 'watches are set on the live session', exact expression 'current_zookeeper = zookeeper_getter.getZooKeeper().first'). Tests need rewrite to verify behavior (e.g., mock ZooKeeper, verify session renewal happens, test stale session handling) rather than text-matching.
